problem id: 323b9f56
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01000110 -> 01100001
  00001011 -> 10110000
  00101101 -> 11010000
  00110010 -> 00100000
  01100011 -> 00110001
  11000011 -> 00110011
  00000100 -> 01000000
  10001111 -> 11110010

query: 11110110
predicted answer: 01100011
